channel.title: Notice board | Unimi
channel.description: General notice board of the University of Milan "La Statale"

item.title: Upcoming strike
item.description: On Monday, 9 March there may be service disruptions due to a general strike. However, this will not affect the following services: final exams for Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees, postgraduate schools and PhD programmes, issuing of urgent certificates.%0A

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the B1 Preliminary (PET) exam
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge B1 Preliminary (PET) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in April-May at the SLAM Centre according to the calendar reported in the call.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the C1 Advanced (CAE) exam
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge C1 Advanced (CAE) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in April-May at the SLAM Centre according to the calendar reported in the call.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in April-May at the University venue in Piazza S. Alessandro 1 according to the calendar reported in the call.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: University scholarships a.y. 2025/2026 - students enrolled after the "open semester"
item.description: The following provisional ranking has been published a.y. 2025/2026: University scholarships - Students who attended the “open semester” at Unimi and enrolled in the second semester.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: University scholarships - first year of a master's degree programme
item.description: The following definitive ranking has been published: University scholarships - Students enrolled in the first year of a master's degree programme. The outcome is available in your online helpdesk, under "Right to study, grants, accommodation and catering" > "if you want to access the details of the rankings published in the last two academic years"%0A

item.title: Call for the B1 Preliminary (PET) exam on 20 + 22 April 2026
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English B1 Preliminary (PET) exam scheduled on 20 + 22 April 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the B2 First (FCE) exam on 20 + 22 April 2026 - SOLD OUT
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English B2 First (FCE) exam scheduled on 20 + 22 April 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam on 20 + 23 April 2026
item.description: The call is open to register for the digital Cambridge English C2 Proficiency (CPE) exam scheduled on 20 + 23 April 2026.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Extended weekend opening hours at the BICF Library
item.description: From Saturday, 7 February 2026, the Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Computer Sciences Library (BICF) will extend its weekend opening hours: Saturday and Sunday, 9-20.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: University Library Service – spring course calendar 2026
item.description: The list of courses offered by the University Library Service in spring 2026 is now online. These courses focus on the use of databases, and are open to the entire University community.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it
